bead.title: B22d-e: BuildArgs signature change from RunOptions to internal struct
bead.description:
Step e/h of B22d decomposition.

Change BuildArgs's parameter from RunOptions to a new internal buildArgsInput struct (or explicit args). Update agent_test.go's 15+ call sites in the same commit. Adjacent runner.go call sites stay on RunOptions internally — runner.go is not in the AC removal list (B22 final retires that).

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/runner.go BuildArgs function signature
- cli/internal/agent/agent_test.go (15+ call sites)

Out-of-scope:
- Other runner.go internal RunOptions usage
bead.acceptance: field buildArgsInput declared. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... passes.
